inclusion_rule: Track a case if it seeks or produces systemic relief (directions, guidelines, monitoring, policy change) on road safety. Exclude individual compensation appeals unless precedent-setting — those go to notable_judgments.

seed_cases.title: S. Rajaseekaran v. Union of India
seed_cases.why_seeded: Master road-safety PIL: SC Committee on Road Safety (Sapre Committee), Jan 2024 hit-and-run compensation directions, MACT reforms, ongoing monitoring.

seed_cases.title: SaveLIFE Foundation v. Union of India
seed_cases.why_seeded: Good Samaritan PIL — 2016 guidelines given force of law.

seed_cases.title: Gohar Mohammed v. Uttar Pradesh SRTC
seed_cases.why_seeded: Systemic MACT directions: DAR workflow, police/insurer timelines.

seed_cases.title: In Re: Phalodi Accident (Suo Motu)
seed_cases.why_seeded: Live suo motu with the largest active direction set (highway safety, ATMS, blackspots); title-based query so its orders are caught even when no discovery phrase appears in the text.

seed_cases.title: Gyan Prakash v. Union of India
seed_cases.why_seeded: Pending NH encroachment-removal matter with open ledger directions; needs a title query for the same reason.

citation_follow_docids_note: During backfill, resolve seed cases' principal IK docids, then use doc(maxcitedby=50) to find newer cases citing them — catches oddly-worded matters the query battery misses.
